text.title: Hipaa Phi Data Flow Design Worked Example
text.summary: One full worked example of the spec artefact end-to-end. Use as a calibration anchor when drafting new instances.

example.context: A canonical hipaa-phi-data-flow-design instance drafted from a triggering brief and a constraint list. Inputs cited, decision recorded, validator green, owner signed off without rework.
example.output: The artefact produced by the procedure in `content/04-procedure.xml`, conforming to the schema in `content/02-output-contract.xml`.

evaluation.criterion: Owner is a named human or role-with-rotation.

section.title: Notes
section.p: The smoke-test template (`templates/_smoke-test.md`) holds the canonical filled-in version. Treat it as the answer key during calibration.
